---
title: "Softwares"
---

Select an app from the **Softwares** menu in the navbar, or choose one below, to launch it directly on this page.

<div class="mb-3">
  <select id="app-select" class="form-select" style="max-width: 400px;">
    <option value="">— Select an app —</option>
    <option value="prescription">Prescription generator</option>
    <option value="load-velocity">Load-velocity model</option>
  </select>
</div>

<div id="app-container"></div>

<script>
const APPS = {
  prescription: {
    title: "Prescription generator",
    url: "https://cr8mnj-felix-boudry.shinyapps.io/prescription_generator/",
  },
  "load-velocity": {
    title: "Load-velocity model",
    url: "https://cr8mnj-felix-boudry.shinyapps.io/load-velocity_model/",
  },
};

function renderApp(key) {
  const container = document.getElementById("app-container");
  const select = document.getElementById("app-select");
  const app = APPS[key];

  if (!app) {
    container.innerHTML = "";
    if (select) select.value = "";
    return;
  }

  if (select) select.value = key;

  container.innerHTML = `
    <h2>${app.title}</h2>
    <div class="ratio ratio-16x9" style="--bs-aspect-ratio: 66.6667%;">
      <iframe src="${app.url}" allowfullscreen loading="lazy"
        style="border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color); border-radius: 0.375rem;"></iframe>
    </div>
    <p class="mt-2">
      <a href="${app.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Open in a new tab</a>
    </p>
  `;
}

document.getElementById("app-select").addEventListener("change", (e) => {
  const key = e.target.value;
  const url = new URL(window.location);
  if (key) {
    url.searchParams.set("app", key);
  } else {
    url.searchParams.delete("app");
  }
  window.history.replaceState({}, "", url);
  renderApp(key);
});

const initialKey = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("app");
if (initialKey) renderApp(initialKey);
</script>
